components.description: a bit of fur, a piece of amber, and a silver pin

body.description: A bolt of lightning strikes a target you choose, then arcs to up to 3 additional targets within 30 feet. Each target makes a Dexterity save, taking 10d8 lightning damage on a fail or half on a success.
A thin green ray springs from your finger. The target must succeed on a Dexterity save or take 10d6+40 force damage; if reduced to 0 HP, it is disintegrated.
Choose a creature you can see within range. Surges of positive energy wash through it, restoring 70 HP and ending Blinded, Deafened, and any disease on it.

components.description: ointment for the eyes worth 25+ GP

body.description: The willing creature you touch has Truesight with a range of 120 feet for the duration.
